title: Aroma Naturals Aromatherapy Scented Candle Shea Butter Wax, Brown Glass Jar with Cork Lid, Luxury Gift for Women, (Medium 240G, Sleep)
features: Premium Wax Blend – Made with 51% shea butter wax and paraffin for a clean, smooth burn and enhanced fragrance performance.
Long-Lasting Scent – Infused with 8% fragrance load to deliver a rich, consistent aroma that fills the room.
Stylish & Sustainable Design – Reusable brown glass jar with natural cork lid for a minimalist, eco-conscious touch.
Multiple Sizes & Wick Options – Available in 240g (1-wick), 425g (2-wick), and 470g (3-wick) with burn times from 30–40+ hours
Five Signature Scents – Choose from Calm, Sleep, Balance, Restore, or Revive – ideal for gifting or daily wellbeing rituals.
description: Create a calming sanctuary at home with the Aroma Naturals Aromatherapy Range – a collection of luxurious scented candles crafted to relax, restore, and revive the senses. Each candle is hand-poured into a stylish brown glass vessel and topped with a natural cork lid, combining elegant design with soothing fragrance. Made with a premium blend of 51% shea butter wax and paraffin, each candle contains 8% fragrance load for a long-lasting, consistent aroma. Available in three sizes (240g, 425g, 470g) and wick configurations (1-wick, 2-wick, and 3-wick), this range delivers an elevated sensory experience for any space or mood. Choose from five signature scents designed to complement your wellbeing rituals: Calm – gentle, soothing, and serene Sleep – soft, comforting, and restful Balance – grounding, refreshing, and harmonious Restore – revitalising, clean, and uplifting Revive – energising, bright, and awakening Whether you're setting the tone for a mindful morning or winding down after a long day, the Aroma Naturals Aromatherapy Range makes the perfect gift or personal treat.
